title: acroceras ridleyi
intro: Acroceras ridleyi is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acroceras ridleyi include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction, which is a liquid extract used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a topical application to promote wound healing.
